title: A Star Is Born
review_summary: The reviewer enjoyed Judy Garland’s performance but found both versions lacking in engagement; however, they praised Tom Hanks’ realistic and modernized '76 version for its compelling narrative. They questioned why the older film is still popular despite it not being critically acclaimed like this remake.

title: The Garden of Allah
review_summary: Marlene Dietrich's performance shines amidst beautiful but hollow cinematography in this underwhelming 1930s film, with memorable supporting cast contributions. Despite its flaws like poor editing and character inconsistencies, it remains noteworthy due to Max Steiner’s score; John Gilbert would have been a fitting replacement star for the lead role of Boris.
